parameters.name: prompt

parameters.jsCode: return [{json: {status: 'blocked', pdf_url: $json.pdf_url, arxiv_id: $json.arxiv_id, reason: 'PDF not publicly accessible'}}];

const root = $json.body !== undefined ? $json.body : $json;
return [{ json: { question: String(root.message || ''), history: Array.isArray(root.history) ? root.history : [] } }];

const u = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { output: u.output || '', status: u.status || 'ok', rag_used: u.rag_used } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 2000, messages: JSON.parse($json.messages_json) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 2000, messages: JSON.parse($json.messages_json) }) }}
